description:
Implement the near-term beadwork TUI plan from `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/tui-proposal.md`.

Outcome we want:
- bare `/bw` opens a pi-native dashboard whenever beadwork is available, even in neutral sessions
- the default surface is an issue explorer with a ready-first filter, breadcrumb drill-in/out, and scope retargeting
- workers get a real operations console with land/cancel/cleanup actions
- delegate/run flows get clarify modals
- the run view stays single-epic-first; multi-epic orchestration remains explicitly deferred

Ticket-structure rule for this epic:
- every ready child ticket should be safe to hand to a different agent in parallel when possible
- prefer agent-cohesive slices over plan-section purity
- serialize work when shared files would otherwise create merge-back pain
- avoid having two ready tickets require heavy concurrent edits to `src/index.ts`, `src/tui/dashboard.ts`, or the same action module at the same time

Recommended execution shape:
1. lay down the shared action/command/dashboard scaffolding
2. split into parallel-safe issue-explorer and worker-manager lanes
3. converge for clarify modals + single-run panel
4. finish with docs/polish/regression coverage

Package scope:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/**`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/README.md`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/**`

Definition of done for implementation tickets in this epic:
- add/update tests under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__`
- run `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- run `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- run `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`

Do not treat deferred multi-epic supervisor/state redesign as part of this epic's required scope.
title: Ship an actionable beadwork dashboard and TUI workflow for `packages/pi-beadwork-extension`
